headline: Payment Processors Race for Enterprise Share as Stripe Raises Rates

competitors.name: Stripe
competitors.pricing_model: 3.5% plus 35 cents per transaction for card payments, raised from 2.9% effective May 1 amid margin pressure
competitors.market_positioning: Premium pricing signals Stripe is moving upmarket toward high-volume enterprise merchants away from SMB developers
competitors.confidence_notes: Bloomberg Intelligence estimates the increase adds roughly 140 million dollars in annualized revenue at current transaction volumes

competitors.name: Square
competitors.pricing_model: 49 dollars per month flat rate for Square for Retail Plus; hardware bundles driving attach rate
competitors.market_positioning: Dominant in US SMB physical retail; hardware ecosystem creates switching costs that online-only processors cannot match
competitors.confidence_notes: Square parent Block reported hardware revenue up 18 percent year-over-year in Q1; strong forward guidance

competitors.name: Adyen
competitors.pricing_model: Interchange plus processing fee with no monthly fees; expanding into SMB with new flat-rate tier announced May 2026
competitors.market_positioning: Expanding beyond Fortune 500 into mid-market; flat-rate tier directly targets Square and Stripe developer base
competitors.confidence_notes: Adyen flat-rate at 0.3% plus 11 cents positions it as lowest-cost option for merchants processing over 50k monthly
